name: Can boss fire me for claiming hearing loss comp?

mainEntity.name: Can boss fire me for claiming hearing loss comp?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, retaliation is illegal; protected under OSHA and comp laws.[2] Context: Employers can't punish for safety complaints or claims.[2] Key factors: Timing of firing post-claim signals violation.[2] Practical guidance: Document interactions, file OSHA complaint if threatened, consult lawyer immediately.[2][7] Protections strong.
